markets.rules_primary: If the Nasdaq 100 index value on Jul 15, 2026 at 10am EDT is above 31189.99, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market will close on July 15, 2026. The market will expire at the sooner of the first release of the data, or one week after July 15, 2026.

Pursuant to the Kalshi Rulebook, the Exchange has modified the Source Agency and Underlying for indices markets. See the rules for more information.

markets.rules_primary: If the Nasdaq 100 index value on Jul 15, 2026 at 10am EDT is above 30379.99, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market will close on July 15, 2026. The market will expire at the sooner of the first release of the data, or one week after July 15, 2026.

Pursuant to the Kalshi Rulebook, the Exchange has modified the Source Agency and Underlying for indices markets. See the rules for more information.
